creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Checked them all. Only three needs patching:
./www/py-rhodecode
./devel/py-celery
./devel/py-TGScheduler

All the other do not have strict dependency on 1.5 (or just define !2.0) 
or do not need dateutil at all like devel/py-mwlib (patch sent to 
maintainer). Please fix two of your ports and I will deal with 
py-TGScheduler. That's will be all that's needed :)

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
